title: clematis heracleifolia subsp. normalis
intro: Clematis heracleifolia subsp. normalis is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis heracleifolia subsp. normalis include relief from menstrual cramps, fever reduction, and wound healing. It can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues.
